analytics.body: The analytics tab is routed and ready for mocked chart data in a later step.

chat.body: The chat tab is routed and ready for the multi-agent advisor UI.

chatSessions.body: Chat history navigation is reserved here for session browsing.

editProfile.body: Profile editing will connect to the onboarding upsert endpoint later.

languageSettings.body: Language preferences will live here while i18n remains app-wide.

login.body: JWT login will connect here when backend auth ships.
login.title: Log in

map.body: The map tab is routed and ready for react-native-maps integration.

myAir.body: The dashboard tab is routed and ready for live AQI, forecast, and recommendation data.

notificationSettings.body: Notification preferences are routed here and stay mocked for now.

notifications.body: The notification center route is ready for the mocked alert flow.

onboarding.body: The health profile flow will collect personalization inputs here.
onboarding.title: Health profile

profile.body: The profile tab is routed and ready for health, lifestyle, and settings sections.

register.body: Account creation will connect here when backend auth ships.
register.title: Register

settings.body: App settings routes are grouped here for language, theme, and notifications.

welcome.body: The auth stack is ready; mock auth will be wired in a later step.
welcome.title: Welcome
